turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes hello, I'm calling about a bill I received. I think there's an error in the amount.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'd be happy to look into that. Could you share your name and the patient ID or invoice number?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: My name is Fatima Sheikh. Invoice number is, uh, let me find it... INV-20240891.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: One moment please... I have your invoice here, Ms. Sheikh. The total is ₹18,500. Which line item seems incorrect to you?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: There's a charge for a consultation on the 3rd but I only visited on the 5th. The 3rd consultation was not mine, I think.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I see what you mean. There does appear to be a duplicate entry. I'm removing the ₹600 consultation charge from the 3rd. Your revised total comes to ₹17,900.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes that makes sense. Can I pay this on the portal?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely. You can pay via our patient portal at sunriseclinicpune.com or we accept UPI, net banking, and cards at the billing counter. A revised invoice will be sent to your registered email.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Ms. Sheikh. Have a great day!
